description: §19.4.3 `!{}` handler NO-PAYLOAD arm: loadItem('slow') fails the nullary LoadError.Timeout; the `.Timeout` arm lifts it to the nullary Phase.TimedOut, which snapshots as the bare string 'TimedOut' (non-payload variants snapshot bare, per conformance README).
rationale: The `!{}` handler's no-payload arm: loadItem('slow') fails LoadError.Timeout (a nullary error variant); the `.Timeout :> @phase = Phase.TimedOut` arm lifts it to the nullary Phase.TimedOut. A non-payload variant snapshots as a bare string.
